meaning: n.在公地上放牧一头牛之权利
examples: Forget all that indecorous talk of animal flatulence, cow burps, vegetarianism and global warming. Welcome to Cowgate - The Washington Times.
Artist Kaitie Lorimer was particularly saddened by the fire as she used to have a studio in the Cowgate.
The Cowgate, the Grassmarket, most of Gorgie Road, London Road and the top of Easter Road will be added to the central zone.
